evidence: Native arm64 execution was confirmed, but both LLDB launch attempts failed with 'process exited with status -1 (no such process)'. The printf fallback then captured the vulnerable reserve arithmetic in the PoC: entry_size=16, raw_oldsize=2147483648 (0x80000000) narrowed to oldsize_as_int=-2147483648, grown_cap=268435456, and raw_newsize=4294967296 (0x100000000) narrowed to newsize_as_int=0. The same poc_debug 11 4 run then aborted under ASan in upb_FieldPathVector_Reserve() with requested allocation size 0xffffffff80000000.
